item.title: Gaming Memes Vol 9
item.description:
From CarbotAnimations who apparently did 100 of these, this is just the first one. https://youtu.be/LSyRf8rAjTs?si=CN19Z5B4w7bo4PBu Thank you to SealandIsARealCountry for the source
As always I'm clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. As always, I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE ADHD, Autism, Mental Health, and Millenial https://imgur.com/gallery/G1E6yWd NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P
item.dc:creator: GeeeButtersnaps

item.title: HEY MODS!
item.description: Wanted to attract your attention. There seems to be a problem with Imgur's comment system where no one is getting notifications. Hopefully this non-risque picture from a rather impressive dump will get attention, eyes on the problem, and maybe a notification on when notifications will work again. We really do value the notification system, it's the way we chat back and forth and banter about life through memes. Having it offline is kind of sad. We thank you for your attention to this matter.
item.dc:creator: lightfoot2

item.title: Didn't expect to wake up this morning to find martial law had been declared.
item.description: The 19 States are Alabama, Arkansas, Florida, Georgia, Idaho, Indiana, Iowa, Louisiana, Nebraska, Nevada, New Mexico, Ohio, South Carolina, South Dakota, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, Virginia, and Wyoming. Interesting how those are all compliant Red states. I wonder what the "didn't tread on me" crowd has to say about this.

item.title: WWJD?
item.dc:creator: JasonM1

item.title: She was afraid people would rewrite history, so she recorded over 300,000 hours of TV over 35 years on 71,000 VHS tapes.Marion Stokes recorded television programs nonstop for over three decades. She started in the late 1970s
item.description: She was afraid people would rewrite history, so she recorded over 300,000 hours of TV over 35 years on 71,000 VHS tapes. Marion Stokes recorded television programs nonstop for over three decades. She started in the late 1970s, and by 1979 she was relentlessly capturing everything 24/7, from news to sitcoms, because she noticed that TV networks often erased old shows to save space and money. As a former librarian and activist, Marion cared deeply about making information available to everyone and wanted to save TV history so powerful people couldn't rewrite it however they wanted. Marion once kept up to eight videotape recorders running at the same time, and she got her family to help. For example, her son Michael remembers having to rush home from dinner to change the tapes. When Marion died in 2012, she had recorded about 71,000 tapes. This made her the only person to save such a complete record of television from that time. Now the Internet Archive is digitizing her collection so anyone will be able to watch it online. Thanks to Marion's dedication, her dream of giving everyone access to knowledge is finally coming true. While some sources (NBC News, CNN, etc.) claim she recorded around 800,000 hours of VHS tape. However, later Snopes clarified that the 2013 story claiming 140,000 tapes was not correct, as the total number of tapes counted and shared by the Internet Archive is 70,000+. So maybe the 800,000-hour figure was estimated by accounting for 140,000 tapes. So, mathematically, 24 hours × 365 days × 35 years = 306,600 hours, which is just over 300,000 hours. So I chose this more realistic figure instead.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

Fuck MAGAts!

item.title: Former DOJ pardon attorney says that Trump has pardoned rapists, murderers, and child sex offenders
item.description: Fp edit: so imgur has not been letting me post images for the past week. I'm pushed all my videos. But over multiple times, various types of content and size of content has not been able to be posted. I also didn't get a single notification from comments or front page from this post. Anybody else having issues?

item.title: Guess who got a warning for insulting Medialabs
item.description: I posted something maaaybe PG-13 at worst, but not charitable toward Imgur's parent company. Why did I do it? Because the site is 40% bugs and now notifications don't work. Fun fact: even the notification to tell me about this didn't work. Get your shit together, Medialabs.

item.title: some Programming Humor For A Niche Audience
item.description:
1. Bruh!
2. Bruh.........
3. Bruh...
4. Bruh...
5. Bruh?!
6. Bruh.
7. Bruh...
8. Bruh...
9. Bruh???
10. Bruh?!
11. Bruh...
12. Bruh :(
13. Bruh... thank you!
14. Bruh!!!!
15. The Inide Dev Sycle P.S. Let me share with you that I'm also working on my own game (game dev as a second job currently - nights and weekends, so 14 hour days). If you like weird moral dillema games , you might want to check it out, please wishlist on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: traditional folk music around the world
item.description:
Appalachian music Cedar Swamp (written by Jean Ritchie) sung by gabrielle hope https://www.instagram.com/gabriellehopemusic/?hl=en
Khaen The national instrument of Laos A mouth organ whose pipes are usually made of bamboo
Julie Fowlis - Hug Air a' Bhonaid Mhoir (sung in Scottish Gaelic)
Music of Kazakhstan The lady dombra player is Aidana Kabdylova. Singing with the group Alatau Serileri.
Yanger, a kind of string band popular on the island of Halmahera in Maluku, an area of Indonesia Friends jamming. Life is good.
item.dc:creator: trojanbarfare
